command:
echo '=== N8N ENVIRONMENT ==='
cat /etc/systemd/system/n8n.service 2>/dev/null | grep -i "environment\|exec" | head -20
echo '=== N8N ENV FILE ==='
ls /home/jose/.n8n/ 2>/dev/null
cat /home/jose/.n8n/.env 2>/dev/null | grep -v "PASSWORD\|SECRET\|KEY\|TOKEN\|PASS" | head -20
echo '=== N8N API KEY ==='
# Check if API key is in env file (mask sensitive parts)
if [ -f /home/jose/.n8n/.env ]; then
    grep -i "api_key\|N8N_API" /home/jose/.n8n/.env 2>/dev/null | sed 's/=.*/=***MASKED***/'
fi
echo '=== N8N DATABASE ==='
ls /home/jose/.n8n/*.db 2>/dev/null || echo "no sqlite db found"
sqlite3 /home/jose/.n8n/database.sqlite "SELECT id, name, active FROM workflow_entity LIMIT 20;" 2>/dev/null || echo "sqlite3 not available or different path"
echo '=== FIND N8N DB ==='
find /home/jose/.n8n/ -name "*.db" -o -name "*.sqlite" 2>/dev/null | head -5
echo 'DONE_1852'
